summary:
Hypertension is unrelated to macro-somatic outcomes unique to GDM as compared to conditions like maternal obesity or direct fetal effects such as those seen with anemia during pregnancy. \(\boxed{\text{Hypertension}}\) The condition least tied to macrosomic infants resulting solely from uncontrolled GDM among these options is hypertension. 

The summary focuses only on the critical aspects regarding association between hypertensive status and specific diabetic complications affecting neonatal size at birth pertinent for this diagnostic query.
